# Spritfy

> Free online pixel art editor, sprite sheet generator, and image format converter for game developers and pixel art enthusiasts.

## About

Spritfy is a browser-based tool suite. No installation or registration required. All processing happens locally in the browser.

Available in Korean and English.

## Tools

### Pixel Art Editor
Draw pixel art with layers, animation timeline, symmetry tools, palette presets, and GIF/PNG export. Supports onion skinning, grid overlay, and custom canvas sizes.
- URL: https://spritfy.xyz/en/editor

### Sprite Sheet Generator
Convert video and GIF files to sprite sheets. Features include frame extraction, background removal (chroma key), custom grid layout, and PNG export.
- URL: https://spritfy.xyz/en/sprite

### Image Format Converter
Convert images between PNG, JPG, WebP, GIF, BMP, and ICO formats. Batch conversion supported. All processing done client-side.
- URL: https://spritfy.xyz/en/converter

## Guides

### Sprite Sheet Guide
Learn what sprite sheets are, why they are used in game development, and how to create them step by step.
- URL: https://spritfy.xyz/en/guide/sprite-sheet

### Pixel Art Guide
A beginner-friendly guide covering pixel art fundamentals, techniques, and tips for creating game-ready artwork.
- URL: https://spritfy.xyz/en/guide/pixel-art

## Technical Details

- Built with React, runs entirely in the browser
- No server-side processing - all image/video operations happen client-side
- Supports modern browsers (Chrome, Firefox, Safari, Edge)
- Free to use with no usage limits

## Links

- Website: https://spritfy.xyz
- Korean version: https://spritfy.xyz/ko/
- English version: https://spritfy.xyz/en/
